---
title: "Bayesian Games"
short-title: "Bayesian Games"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Types, Bayesian Nash equilibrium, signaling, and pooling vs. separating equilibria."
keywords: ["Bayesian games", "incomplete information", "BNE", "signaling"]
---

# Bayesian Games {#sec-bayesian-games}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
